<!--
Thanks for contributing to Olla! Keep this short. A clear summary and a green `make ready`
get a PR reviewed faster. Delete sections that do not apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? One or two sentences. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Backend / integration support
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal (no behaviour change)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, or new tests added. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ready` passes (test + race + fmt + vet + lint)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Documentation updated (`./docs`) if behaviour or config changed
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or called out and justified below)
